title: Cylindrokelupha bubalina
intro: There is not enough information available about the plant Cylindrokelupha bubalina to write a paragraph about it.
taxonomy: Cylindrokelupha bubalina is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is classified under the subfamily Epidendroideae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other orchid species. The exact classification can be further broken down into the tribe Cranichideae, and the genus Cylindrokelupha. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary history and relationships of Cylindrokelupha bubalina with other orchid species.
